# kSecAttrComment

**Global Variable**

A key with a value that’s a string indicating a comment associated with the item.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecAttrComment: CFString
```

## Discussion

The corresponding value is of type [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFString] and contains the user-editable comment for this item.
title: kSecAttrComment
